items.title: Open Source Security Tool Trivy Hit by Supply Chain Attack, Prompting Urgent Industry Response
items.summary: A major security incident affecting the widely used open source vulnerability scanner Trivy has exposed critical weaknesses in software supply chain security, after maintainers confirmed that a malicious release was briefly distributed to users. By Craig Risi

items.title: Most and least shorted mid-to mega-cap healthcare stocks in March
Patrick Wilson’s Latest Horror Movie Is Coming To Prime Video Soon
items.summary: A Patrick Wilson-led horror movie will begin streaming on Amazon Prime Video later this month. It is a part of the franchise that began in 2013 and has several movies. The Conjuring: Last Rites to stream on Prime Video this month The Conjuring: Last Rites will premiere on Amazon Prime Video on Tuesday, April 21, […] The post Patrick Wilson’s Latest Horror Movie Is Coming To Prime Video Soon appeared first on ComingSoon.net - Movie Trailers, TV & Streaming News, and More .
